title: Surgeon Vacancy at RML Hospital - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at RML Hospital - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at RML Hospital. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Surgeon to strengthen our Jodhpur-based team.

About RML Hospital:
RML Hospital is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Jodhpur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RML Hospital!
